name: adv-degraded-capability
notes: vitest's structured channel provides no failing-source-region text, so the adapter declares source-region-text unsupported. Because degraded_capabilities is therefore always non-empty, every red-in-both claim must carry it: the report's failure_evidence.degraded_capabilities is ["source-region-text"], composition_id is vitest-native/1, and each still_fail_unchanged entry is an object carrying the same degraded_capabilities array.
